nodes.name: DevRestartBanner.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the DevRestartBanner component, verifying rendering and behavior using React's createRoot and act.

nodes.name: DevRestartBanner.tsx
nodes.summary: React component that displays a development server restart notification banner with pending migrations, changed file paths, and a manual restart trigger using a timed auto-restart mechanism.

nodes.name: formatRelativeTimestamp
nodes.summary: Converts a timestamp value to a human-readable relative time string (seconds, minutes, or hours ago).

nodes.name: DevRestartBanner
nodes.summary: Exported React component that shows a dev-server restart banner with auto-restart countdown, pending migrations list, changed files sample, and a manual restart confirmation dialog.

nodes.name: KanbanBoard.test.tsx
nodes.summary: Unit tests for the KanbanBoard component, including helpers to create mock issues and render the board with configurable props.

nodes.name: KanbanBoard.tsx
nodes.summary: Full-featured drag-and-drop Kanban board React component with configurable columns per issue status, collapsible columns, pagination-style reveal, live issue highlighting, and compact card mode powered by dnd-kit.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses dnd-kit (useDroppable, useSortable, useSensors) for accessible drag-and-drop; exports multiple constants (thresholds, page sizes) so consumers can tune board behavior.

nodes.name: resolveKanbanTargetStatus
nodes.summary: Exported helper that determines the destination status when a card is dropped, resolving whether the drop target is a column or another card.

nodes.name: KanbanColumn
nodes.summary: Internal React component rendering a single Kanban column with a droppable zone, collapsible header, visible issue cards, and a 'show more' pagination control.

nodes.name: KanbanCard
nodes.summary: Internal React component representing a single sortable Kanban card that displays issue metadata, assignee identity, and a handoff indicator, supporting compact and overlay modes.

nodes.name: KanbanBoard
nodes.summary: Exported root Kanban board component orchestrating DndContext, drag start/end handlers, issue grouping by status, and rendering all KanbanColumn instances with a drag overlay.

nodes.name: Layout.tsx
nodes.summary: Central application shell component that wires together navigation sidebar, mobile nav, plugin slots, keyboard shortcuts, company selection sync, instance settings persistence, and scroll/focus management for the entire UI.
nodes.languageNotes: Heavily hooks-driven with 35 imports; manages localStorage persistence for instance settings path and dispatches custom DOM events for cross-component communication.

nodes.name: Layout
nodes.summary: Exported React component serving as the top-level application layout, coordinating sidebar state, company routing, plugin slot resolution, keyboard shortcuts, mobile nav visibility, and scroll reset on navigation.
